name: author-speak-before
value: Today we're going to learn about the CycloneDX CLI tool.

name: slide-display
slide-display
value:
2. Restore it and call it in your `.gitlab-ci.yml` for example:

```yml
# Restore the CycloneDX tool
- dotnet tool restore

# Generate SBOM using CycloneDX JSON
- dotnet CycloneDX -F Json "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/src/$projectName.sln" -o sbom -fn "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/doc/cyclonedx/$projectName.json"
```
